config.script:
'////////////////////////////////////////// '// (c) 2001 NAVO // '// get_obj_pic_id // '// external // '//////////////////////////////////////////
#include "50105"
function get_obj_pic_id(byval nTypeId, byval nIdObj, byval nUsage) dim pObj select case nTypeId
case TYPEID_N5PRODUKT if nIdObj <> 0 then set pObj = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5PRODUKT,nIdObj) if pObj is nothing then get_obj_pic_id = PICTURE_CHOICE_N5PRODUKT else if pObj.eAktywny = N5PRODUKT_NIEAKTYWNY then get_obj_pic_id = PICTURE_CHOICE_N5PRODUKT_NIEAKTYWNY exit function end if end if get_obj_pic_id = PICTURE_CHOICE_N5PRODUKT end if
case TYPEID_N5KLIENT if nIdObj <> 0 then 'to do: dodać do h1231.h stałą N5KLIENT_NIEAKTYWNY set pObj = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5KLIENT,nIdObj) if not pObj is nothing then if pObj.eAktywny = 2 then get_obj_pic_id = PICTURE_CHOICE_N5KLIENT_NIEAKTYWNY exit function end if end if end if get_obj_pic_id = PICTURE_CHOICE_N5KLIENT
case TYPEID_N5KRAJ get_obj_pic_id = PICTURE_CHOICE_N5KRAJ
case TYPEID_N5LICENCJA get_obj_pic_id = PICTURE_CHOICE_N5LICENCJA
case TYPEID_N5WOJEWODZTWO get_obj_pic_id = PICTURE_CHOICE_N5WOJEWODZTWO
case TYPEID_N5PRACOWNIK get_obj_pic_id = PICTURE_CHOICE_N5PRACOWNIK
case TYPEID_N5REGION get_obj_pic_id = PICTURE_CHOICE_N5REGION
case TYPEID_N5KLIENT_PRACOWNIK get_obj_pic_id = PICTURE_CHOICE_N5KLIENT_PRACOWNIK
case TYPEID_N5UZYTKOWNIK get_obj_pic_id = PICTURE_CHOICE_N5UZYTKOWNIK
case TYPEID_N5BANK get_obj_pic_id = PICTURE_CHOICE_N5BANK
case TYPEID_N5TYPDZIALANIA get_obj_pic_id = PICTURE_CHOICE_N5TYPDZIALANIA
case TYPEID_N5PLATNOSC get_obj_pic_id = PICTURE_CHOICE_N5PLATNOSC
case TYPEID_N5WYKONAWCA get_obj_pic_id = PICTURE_CHOICE_N5WYKONAWCA
case TYPEID_N5DEKRET get_obj_pic_id = PICTURE_CHOICE_N5DEKRET
case TYPEID_N5DOWODKSIEG get_obj_pic_id = PICTURE_CHOICE_N5DOWODKSIEG
case TYPEID_N5INSTYTUCJA get_obj_pic_id = PICTURE_CHOICE_N5INSTYTUCJA
case TYPEID_N5ZADANIEZAL get_obj_pic_id = PICTURE_CHOICE_N5ZADANIEZAL
case TYPEID_N5KONTO get_obj_pic_id = PICTURE_CHOICE_N5KONTO
case TYPEID_N5TYPINSTYTUCJI get_obj_pic_id = PICTURE_CHOICE_N5TYPINSTYTUCJI
case TYPEID_N5POZSPRZEDAZ get_obj_pic_id = PICTURE_CHOICE_N5POZSPRZEDAZ
case TYPEID_N5SPRZEDAZ get_obj_pic_id = PICTURE_CHOICE_N5SPRZEDAZ
case TYPEID_N5TYPDOKUMENTU get_obj_pic_id = PICTURE_CHOICE_N5TYPDOKUMENTU
case TYPEID_N5TRANSAKCJA get_obj_pic_id = PICTURE_CHOICE_N5TRANSAKCJA
case TYPEID_N5SCHEMATDEKR get_obj_pic_id = PICTURE_CHOICE_N5SCHEMATDEKR
case TYPEID_N5FIRMA get_obj_pic_id = PICTURE_CHOICE_N5FIRMA
case TYPEID_N5BRANZA get_obj_pic_id = PICTURE_CHOICE_N5BRANZA
case TYPEID_CHOICELIST get_obj_pic_id = PICTURE_CHOICE_N5CHOICELIST
case TYPEID_N5SODGROUP get_obj_pic_id = PICTURE_CHOICE_N5SODGROUP
case TYPEID_N5SOD get_obj_pic_id = PICTURE_CHOICE_N5SOD
case TYPEID_N5SECURITYOBJ get_obj_pic_id = PICTURE_CHOICE_N5SECURITYOBJ
case TYPEID_N5PROCEDURA get_obj_pic_id = PICTURE_CHOICE_N5PROCEDURA
case TYPEID_N5_KLIENT_JEDN_ORG get_obj_pic_id = PICTURE_CHOICE_N5_KLIENT_JEDN_ORG
case TYPEID_N5JEDN_ORG get_obj_pic_id = PICTURE_CHOICE_N5JEDN_ORG
case TYPEID_N5MIEJSCOWOSC get_obj_pic_id = PICTURE_CHOICE_N5MIEJSCOWOSC
case TYPEID_N5GRUPAPRODUKTOW get_obj_pic_id = PICTURE_CHOICE_N5GRUPAPRODUKTOW
case TYPEID_N5DOKUMENT get_obj_pic_id = PICTURE_CHOICE_N5DOKUMENT
case TYPEID_N5GRUPAKLIENT get_obj_pic_id = PICTURE_CHOICE_N5GRUPAKLIENT
case TYPEID_N5MAGAZYN get_obj_pic_id = PICTURE_CHOICE_N5MAGAZYN
case TYPEID_N5POZDOKMAG get_obj_pic_id = PICTURE_CHOICE_N5POZDOKMAG
case TYPEID_N5DOKMAG get_obj_pic_id = PICTURE_CHOICE_N5DOKMAG
case TYPEID_N5ZADANIE if nIdObj <> 0 then set pObj = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5ZADANIE,nIdObj) if not pObj is nothing then get_obj_pic_id = EventStatus2PicNum(pObj.nStatus) else get_obj_pic_id = PICTURE_CHOICE_N5ZADANIE end if else get_obj_pic_id = PICTURE_CHOICE_N5ZADANIE end if
case TYPEID_N5OPAKOWANIE_PRODUKTU get_obj_pic_id = PICTURE_CHOICE_N5OPAKOWANIE_PRODUKTU
case TYPEID_N5REJESTRDOK get_obj_pic_id = PICTURE_CHOICE_N5REJESTRDOK
case TYPEID_SEARCHTYPE if nIdObj <> 0 then set pObj = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_SEARCHTYPE,nIdObj) if not pObj is nothing then if pObj.cKind = "R" then get_obj_pic_id = PICTURE_CHOICE_N5SEARCH_RAPORT exit function end if end if 'todo: zmienić gdy będzie rysunek get_obj_pic_id = PICTURE_CHOICE_ELEMENT end if
case TYPEID_N5JEDNOSTKA if nIdObj <> 0 then set pObj = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5JEDNOSTKA,nIdObj) if not pObj is nothing then if pObj.eTyp = N5JEDNOSTKA_MIARY then get_obj_pic_id = PICTURE_CHOICE_N5MIARA exit function else get_obj_pic_id = PICTURE_CHOICE_N5WALUTA exit function end if end if end if get_obj_pic_id = PICTURE_CHOICE_ELEMENT
case else get_obj_pic_id = PICTURE_CHOICE_ELEMENT
end select end function
